titleStmt.title: SII 26.716: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 716. (A.R. No. 665 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Viruppaṇa-uḍaiyār, son of Ariyaṇa-uḍaiyār: Ś. 1306, Raktākshi, Siṁha (Āvaṇi) śu. 2, Friday, Hastam = 1384 A.D., August 19, f.d.n. ·09.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in several places.

It records a prīti-dāna parivarttanai (i.e., exchange) of lands given by a number of persons (names given) of Kiḷiyūr-nāḍu in [•••••]puṟam in Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu in favour of a certain Śāykkuḍaiyāṉ Nachchiṉārkkiṉiyār-nāyakar alias Nāyaṉār ••••• Āḷuḍaittēva-nāyaṉār belonging to the aḍimattiṟam of Śeṅkamalappoṟpāda-nāyaṉār of the lineage of Meykaṇḍadēva-nāyaṉār. It is stated that lands given in exchange were of the extent of 6-1/2 plus 2 mā (totalling to 132mā) and were located in various places such as Kaḷḷikuḍi, Aḍaiñjiyūr, etc, and that the exchanged area was called Tāḍaṉapuram in the same nāḍu and it was given to the above-mentioned person to provide for the repairs, worship and festivals in the shrine of the god Nāyaṉār (name lost) set up in the enclosure tiruchchuṟṟi) of the temple of the god Tiruneḍuṅguṉṟam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār in Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉi-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that the gift was a tirunāmattukkāṇi.

The names of the persons who gave this prītidāna and who had affixed their signatures at the end are as follows: Śākkuḍaiyāṉ Poṉṉambalachchokkar Nāyaṉ Pāṇḍiyadaraiyar, Śēndappiḷḷai Kurukularāyar, Nachchiṉārkkiṉiyar Sūriyadēvar, Pūnar Sēndar, Tirunelvēli-uḍaiyār Kurukularāyar Tavapperumāḷ, and Nāyakar Tirumāṇikkamalai-uḍaiyār, Aḻagaiy Piḷḷaiyār Villavarāyar Kūttap-Perumāḷ, etc. The accountant of the nāḍu Iriñiyūruḍaiyān Iḷaiyanārāyaṇapperumāḷ and the representative of the aḍimaittiṟam of Śeṅkamalappoṟpādamaḻagiyār of the lineage of Poykaṇḍagaṉṟa Meykaṇḍadēvar-nāyiṉār, Śāykkuḍaiyāṉnāyakaṉ Āḷuḍaittēvaṉ also figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīariyaṇa Uṭaiyar kumāraṉ viruppaṇa Uṭaiyarkkuc cellāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 6ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa Irattākṣi varuṣam siṁhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvitiyaiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattunāḷ meykaṇṭa tevanāyaṉār cantāṉattu ceṅkamalappoppāta nāyaṉār Aṭimaittiṟattu cāykkuṭaiyāṉ nacciṉārkkiṉiyār nāyakarāṉa nāyaṉār Āḷuṭaitteva nāyaṉārkkup pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu
puṟak kiḷiyūr nāṭṭuc cākkuṭaiyāṉ poṉṉampalac cokkarnāyaṉ pāṇṭiyataraiyarum centappiḷḷai kurukularāyarum nacciṉākkiṉiyār cūriyatevarum pūmarcentarum tirunelveli Uṭaiyār kurukularāyar tavapperumāḷum nāyakar tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭai- yārum Aḻakaypiḷḷaiyār villavarāyar kūttapperumāḷum tiruppentarāṉa tirunelveli Uṭaiyārum pūtalūruṭaiyāṉ pāṇṭikulācaṉi viḻupparaiyar mutaliyar nāyaṉārum pūtalūruṭaiyāṉ maḻavataraiyar mutaliyanāyiṉārum Iṉṉāṭṭu Eyil nāṭṭu Aṭaiñciyūruṭaiyāṉ vikkiramar ka rum
kiḷiyūr nāṭṭu maṉṟuḷāṭum perumāḷ maḻavataraiyarum Āti Ivvaṉaivarom prititāṉa pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu kaḷḷikkuṭiyil nāṅkaḷ priti- yāka kuṭutta nāyaṉ pāṇṭiyataraiyar nilam (1/2) centappiḷḷai kurukularāyar nilam (1/2)m nacciṉākkiṉināyakar Uḷpātiyil Uḷvaṉa piṭākaiyil paṟṟiviṭṭa nilam (1/4) Āka nilam mukkāl nacciṉākkiṉiyār cūriyatevar nilam (1/2)m pūtalūr Uṭaiyār maḻavataraiyar nacciṉākkiṉiyār A nilam (1/2) Āka nilam kali pūmācentar nilam (1/2)m Aṭaiñciyūr Uṭaiyār vikkiramar kāliṅkarāyar Aṭaiñciyūril tiruvaiyāṟṟu Uṭalnilam Araiyum viṭṭu pūmācentar Aṅṣatti nta nilam (1/2) Āka nilam 1 li tirunelve
kurukularāyar yātavapperumāḷ nilam (1/2) yatar tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiyār nilam 2 Aḻakiyapiḷḷaiyār villavarāyar kūttapperumāḷ nilam (1/4)m nacciṉākkiṉiyār nāyakarāṉa Āḷuṭaittevanāyaṉār Upātiyil vaḷavaṉ piṭākaiyil paṟṟiviṭṭa nilam (1/4) Āka nilam (1/2) tiruppentarāṉa tirunelveli Uṭaiyār nilam (1/2) Āka nilam 5 lim pūtalūr Uṭaiyār pāṇṭikulācaṉi vi l paḻuti nāṇi nilam yūr Uṭaiyār maṉṟuḷāṭum perumāḷ maḻavataraiyar kiḷiyūr nilam (1/2) Āka nilam 5(1/2) 4 mā Iṉṉilam Añcaraiye nālu māvukkum parivattaṉai ṉikkuṭutta centappiḷḷai kurukularāyarum nacciṉākkiṉiyār
cūriyatevarum pūmācentarum tirunelveli Uṭaiyār kurukularāyar tavapperumāḷum nāyakaṉ tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiyarum Aḻakiyapiḷḷai villavarāyar kūttapperumāḷum tiruppentarāṉa tirunelveli Uṭaiyārum Ivvaṉaivarom parivattaṉai paṇṇikkuṭutta Iṉṉāṭṭut tāṭaṉapuram nilam 5(1/2) çm centappiḷḷaikurukularāyar Uḷḷiṭṭār pratiāka tanta nilam mukkāl ndha Āka Iṉṉilam Āṟaraiye Iraṇṭu māvum pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakavināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tiruccuṟṟi Eḻuntaruḷiyirukkum nāyaṉār koyil tiruppaṇi
ruḷap paṇṇukaiyil Iṉṉāyi ttāṭaṉpāṭi lam Āṟaraiye Iraṇṭu māvum tirunāmattukkāṇi t tirukkaṭṭaḷaiyi le
ṭitāṉa tellaiyum tiruccūlatā m paṇṇi tom Ivvaṉaivarom nāyaṉār tirunāmattāle tāṭaṉpāṭi Āṉa nittamaṇa lūr Ākavum Ippaṭikku parivatta
prititāṉamum kuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivaro cākkuṭaiyarāyaṉ pāṇṭiyataraiyar Eḻuttu cākkuṭaiyāṉ centippiḷḷai kurukularāyar Eḻuttu
ṉa nacciṉākkiṉi cūriyatevar Eḻuttu cākkuṭaiyāṉ pūmācentappiḷḷai Eḻuttu cākkuṭaiyāṉ centippiḷḷai [taruppe tarā]ṉ Eḻuttu
cākkuṭaiyāṉ tirunelveli Uṭaiyāṉ kurukularāyar tavapperumāḷ Eḻuttu cākkuṭaiyāṉ nāyakar tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiyār Eḻuttu
cāyakkuṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiyapiḷḷai villavarāyar kūttapperumāḷ Eḻuttu cāyakkuṭaiyāṉ tiruppentarāṉa tirunelveli Uṭaiyār Eḻuttu pūtalūruṭaiyāṉ pāṇṭikulācaṉi viḻupparaiya
mutaliya nāyaṉār Eḻuttu pūtalūruṭaiyāṉ maḻavataraiyar mutaliya nāyiṉār Eḻuttu Aṭaiñiyūruṭaiyāṉ vikkiramar kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu kiḷiyūr Uṭaiyāṉ maṇalūrupperumāḷ
maḻavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu nāṭṭuk kaṇakku Iriñiyūruṭaiyāṉ Iḷaiyanārāyaṇap perumāḷ Eḻuttu poykaṇṭa kaṉṟa meykaṇṭatevar nāyiṉār cantāṉattu
ceṅkamalappoṟpa tamaḻakiyār Aṭimaittiṟattuc cāyakkuṭaiyāṉ nāyakaṉ Āḷuṭaittevaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.716 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
